# reveal.js Upstream

The learnordie slide engine is planned as a controlled, reduced fork of selected reveal.js core modules.

Canonical product repository:

- https://github.com/metric-space-ai/learnordie

Upstream source:

- https://github.com/hakimel/reveal.js

Target release family:

- reveal.js 6.0.1

When importing upstream code, pin the exact commit here and list every copied path in `manifest.json`.

Do not treat https://github.com/metric-space-ai/learnordie-slide-engine as the source of truth. It was created during exploration and may only be used as a temporary comparison copy.
